2.0: \nl< >"\str[121]! Is there anything you’d like to eat!?"
2.1:
She’s being so eager for once—
what should I even ask for?
2.2:
Eat you!
Meat dishes!
Vegetable dishes!
Anything’s fine
2.3:
\nl< >"Geez~ I’m not food, you know!          \w[90]
If \str[121] doesn’t have anything special in mind,
I’ll come up with a menu myself!"
2.4:
\nl< >"Ehehe~ \str[121]!
you’ve finally realized how delicious meat is!"
2.5:
\nl< >"Just wait,
I’ll make you a huge steak!"
2.6:
\nl< >"But… we don’t have enough ingredients…
I might only be able to make something else today."
2.7:
\nl< >"It’s not really my favorite…     \w[120]
but since \str[121] says wants it, I’ll do my best!"
2.8:
\nl< >"So \str[121], just sit nicely at the table 
and wait for the food to be ready!"        \w[120]
5.0: What should we make to eat today~
10.0:
It's rare to have breakfast with \str[120], 
I'd better do my best!
10.1: I made a simple breakfast with the leftover ingredients.
10.3:
Cooking success!    \w[30]
It's so delicious that all my energy is back!
10.4: "I'm feeling great today, it looks really tasty…"
10.5: I quietly finished breakfast and felt a bit more energized.
10.6:
Oh no!    \w[30]
It's a little burnt…
10.7:
I ate a weird-tasting breakfast,
and somehow I don't feel satisfied at all…
10.9:
Breakfast turned into a lump of charcoal,
tasted it and it had no flavor at all…
10.10:
It's almost time to head out…
I left a note for \str[120], so it should be fine.
12.2: What tasty thing should we add in~
12.8: Is this something you can eat?
12.9: Sweet and sour meat dish… sounds pretty good too?
13.0:
Failed…  \w[60]
\str[120] and I somehow forced ourselves to 
eat the weird food I made…
13.1: I enjoyed a delicious meat dish with \str[120].
13.3: But it was so spicy that \str[120] started crying instantly…
13.4: Also, it was so spicy that \str[120] started crying instantly…
13.5:
\{The savory, fragrant meat dish is a success!
\str[120] looks like she can't wait to dig in—!
13.6:
Before I could even react,
\str[120] had already polished off all the meat 
on the plate with incredible gusto...
13.7:
\{\ii[\v[78]] is a success!    \w[30]
\str[120] looks like she's really looking forward 
to the taste!
17.0:
\nl< >"\str[121]… 
did you wash off all that smell from your body?
Don’t come back all filthy next time."
18.1:
………Eh? Déjà vu?
This scene feels so familiar…!
18.3:
\nl< >"Geez, \str[121]!
you're an injured patient right now, remember!"
18.5:
Overwhelmed by \str[120]'s determination,
I obediently ate the unknown thing she fed me.
18.7:
That familiar shock exploded in my mouth,
maybe I've gotten used to it, I didn't faint this time.
18.8: \nl< >"How is it, \str[121]? Does it taste good?"
18.10:
A wave of heat suddenly surged from my stomach!
All my fatigue was blown away!
18.12: \nl< >"Yay, looks like my training paid off!"
18.13:
What kind of training did she even do?
I was curious, but couldn't bring myself to ask…
21.0:
I don't have a recipe to follow right now… 
should I just make something myself?
21.2:
\nl< >"I'm sorry,\str[121]...       \w[60]
I'm still in training, let me handle it next time!"
21.3:
…Looks like \str[120] is trying her best 
to learn how to cook.
Oh well, I guess I’ll have to make dinner.
21.4:
\nl< >\{"\str[121]!
do you want to eat the food I make!?"
21.5: \nl< >"Oh my, I really can’t say no to you~"
21.6:
\nl< >"Leave it to me! 
I’m confident I can make something really tasty!"
22.2:
With full determination, 
\str[120] dragged my completely limp body to the dining table…
22.3:
\nl< >"Now just wait here for a bit, \str[121]. 
I'll be right back."
22.4:
Food made by \str[120] herself… how should I put it, 
I'm kinda looking forward to it……
But come to think of it, has she ever cooked before…?
22.6:
Staring at this unidentifiable object in front of me,
my whole body started trembling uncontrollably.
22.7:
"Um, dear \str[120]……    \w[60]
\str[121] still has enough strength to feed himself, you know?   \w[150]
If you just take off these bandages……"    \w[20]\^
22.8:
\nl< >"No way! 
You're injured right now, \str[121],
you need proper rest!"
22.9:
\nl< >"Or maybe… 
my first attempt at cooking really isn't that good……?   \w[120]
In that case, let me taste it first…"
22.11:
Before \str[120] could react,
I quickly leaned forward and 
bit the spoon she was holding out.
22.12:
"Mm… chomp chomp chomp—    \w[60] 
it's kind of————     \w[30]\^
22.15:
It felt like drinking highly carbonated soda,
the weird texture exploded in my mouth instantly,
before I could even react, I blacked out…
22.17:
Ahh… food made by \str[120]'s own hands…
too bad I couldn't finish it…
